title: TCS Nashik case: Court denies bail to 5 more accused citing victim vulnerability, evidence tampering risk
description: A Nashik sessions court on May 15 denied bail to five men accused in the Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) Nashik BPO sexual harassment and religious coercion case [Raza Meman & Ors v. State of Maharashtra].Additional sessions judge VV Kathare denied bail to Raza Rafiq Meman, Asif Aftap Ansari, Shaharukh Husain Shaukat Kureshi, Shafi Bhikan Shaikh, and Tausif Bilal Attar on May 15 citing concerns that their influential nature could lead to witness tampering and evidence manipulation.The Court
